title: OAuth Phishing and Session Hijack Campaign
description: Threat-family style pack that composes email intrusion and identity abuse playbooks into one campaign-level hunt.
hypothesis_templates: Phishing delivery, mailbox tampering, and abnormal session activity are part of a single account-takeover campaign.

execution_targets.name: M365 consent grant and risky app review
execution_targets.description: Review suspicious application consent and delegated permission grants tied to the focus user.
execution_targets.query_template: /auditLogs/directoryAudits?$filter=activityDisplayName eq 'Consent to application' and initiatedBy/user/displayName eq '{{focus_user}}'

blind_spots: Session-token theft that never reuses the mailbox or identity surfaces covered here may still require browser or proxy telemetry outside the pack.
notes: This is the first family-level pack and is intentionally composed from lower-level domain playbooks rather than restating them.
